SEARCH
Package com.example.lottery.model

Class User

java.lang.Object
com.example.lottery.model.User
public class User extends Object
Model class representing a user in the system.

Target Firestore path: users/{userId}

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    User()
    Default constructor required for Firestore.
    User(String username, String email, String phone)
    Convenience constructor for basic profile information.
    User(String userId, String username, String email, String phone)
    Convenience constructor for basic profile information with userId.
    User(String userId, String deviceId, String email, String phone, String username, String role, com.google.firebase.firestore.GeoPoint location, boolean notificationsEnabled, com.google.firebase.Timestamp createdAt, com.google.firebase.Timestamp updatedAt, List<String> interests)
    Full constructor.
